headline: Vertex Stock Down Nearly 8% in 3 Months: Time to Buy or Stay Cautious?
summary: VRTX stock falls 7.9% in three months as Journavx and Casgevy sales missed expectations, but CF growth, Alyftrek momentum and renal pipeline progress stand out.

headline: Vertex Announces US FDA Acceptance of Biologics License Application for Accelerated Approval of Povetacicept in IgA Nephropathy
summary: BOSTON, June 01, 2026--Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (Nasdaq: VRTX) today announced the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has accepted its Biologics License Application (BLA) submission for povetacicept, an investigational engineered fusion protein and dual inhibitor of the BAFF (B cell activating factor) and APRIL (a proliferation inducing ligand) cytokines, in adults with immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN).
